text: Bitcoin is holding steady above $65k while Ethereum has drifted slightly lower, signaling mixed conviction among the two largest assets despite relatively flat 24-hour moves. Extreme Fear sentiment at 22 has lifted 13 points over the week, suggesting some recovery in investor appetite after deeper capitulation, though $72B in daily volume remains modest for a market of this size. Bitcoin's 56.3% dominance indicates mild strength relative to altcoins, but the overall posture is cautious—neither panic nor enthusiasm driving volume meaningfully higher.
